name: node-minimist
title: node-minimist
description:
Argument options parsing for Node.js
Minimist is the guts of optimist's argument parser without all the
fanciful decoration.
.
Optimist is a light-weight node.js library for option parsing.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-minimist because Argument options parsing for Node.js.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-minimist as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-minimist with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-minimist --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
